summary: Audited M3 protocol, transport, Mac decode/render evidence, receive queue evidence, and the completed cross-device smoke. Three independent subreports found no P0/P1 blockers. M3 can be completed as a conservative endpoint-foundation milestone with explicit non-claims for product QUIC, network-driven VideoToolbox decode, received-sample Metal render/presentation, and latency.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Protocol and Swift fixture compatibility are reviewed.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m3-audit/subreports/protocol-transport.md and reports/qd/m3-audit/subreports/mac-evidence.md review Rust protocol fixtures, Swift EncodedVideoFrameMetadata, fixture mirror tests, and protocol guardrail tests.
reports/qd/m3-audit/subreports/mac-evidence.md reviews VideoToolbox capability/decode reports, Metal renderer reports, Mac receive queue evidence, and Mac receiver artifacts.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Cross-device evidence is reviewed if available.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m3-audit/subreports/protocol-transport.md and reports/qd/m3-audit/subreports/milestone-readiness.md review evidence/m3-cross-device-video-smoke/result.json and the Linux/Mac live-run artifacts.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: P0/P1 findings are resolved or dispositioned.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: All three subreports record no P0/P1 findings; qd finding list --open returned no open findings.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: qd audit pass reports are recorded.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m3-audit/audit.json is prepared for qd audit pass.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo test -p madobe-protocol cross_device -- --nocapture

commandsRun.evidence: JSON validation passed before qd complete.
Full Linux check gate passed before qd complete.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This audit reviewed already-recorded real Mac and cross-device evidence, including VideoToolbox decode, Metal render timing, and Linux-to-Mac TCP sample transfer artifacts.

dagChangesNeeded: Future product transport node: validate real QUIC cross-device transport before claiming product streaming.
Future integrated decode node: decode a received network sample with VideoToolbox before claiming network-driven Mac decode.
Future render/presentation node: render and present a received decoded sample with Metal before claiming visible cross-device presentation.
Future latency node: add cross-device frame/latency instrumentation before recording non-null glass-to-glass metrics.
Polish node: rename or clarify Metal render-report presentedTestPattern wording so it cannot be mistaken for onscreen presentation evidence.
